nasb.text: “But the vow of a widow or of a divorced woman, everything by which she has bound herself, shall stand against her.

esv.text: (But any vow of a widow or of a divorced woman, anything by which she has bound herself, shall stand against her.)

cnv.text: “寡婦，或是離了婚的婦人所許的願，就是她所說約束自己的一切話，都為有效。

ccb.text: 倘若寡妇或被休的妇人在什么事上许愿或起誓，她必须履行诺言。
